text:
/atime1.0 /voice11_voice_delicious_npcma_002 これが……
【深遠なる闇】の本当の姿……

/voice11_voice_delicious_npcha_013 こちらの攻撃は
確実に効いています。
このまま、押し切りましょう！

/atime1.0 /voice11_voice_delicious_npchi_002 なんて深い闇……
けど、諦めるもんか！

/atime1.0 /voice11_voice_delicious_npchi_004 攻撃が効いてる！
これなら、倒せる。
あと少しっ、がんばろう！

/voice11_voice_delicious_npcma_015 危ない！
他のところに逃げて！

/voice11_voice_delicious_npcha_002 悠久の因縁に
いまこそ終止符を
打たせてもらいます！
/atime1.0 /voice11_voice_delicious_npcma_002 So This is... the true form of the Profound Darkness.

/voice11_voice_delicious_npcha_013 That really did some damage!
Keep it up, you've got this!

/atime1.0 /voice11_voice_delicious_npchi_002 What deep darkness...
But we can't give up!

/atime1.0 /voice11_voice_delicious_npchi_004 Our attacks are working!
That means we can do this.
Don't let up! We're almost there.

/voice11_voice_delicious_npcma_015 Look out!
Get out of the way!

/voice11_voice_delicious_npcha_002 It’s time to put an end
to this eternal bond!
